steps.title: Interpret the quoted phrase
steps.content: Baldwin says the film reflects Holiday's life and Black Americans' experiences only by courtesy, meaning only nominally or superficially. The next sentence explains that this lack of authenticity is part of a broader failure in films of the era.

steps.title: Reject unsupported film claims
steps.content: Choice A invents a later reconsideration. Choice B says the phrase shows a departure from critical consensus, which the text never discusses. Choice D claims Baldwin preferred earlier films, also unsupported. The phrase identifies the gap between real experience and cinematic representation. The answer is C.
